description: A BKK annotation pinned to a span in a premodern Chinese text, anchored by a stable marker id plus an offset and length in canonical PUA characters. See docs/bkk-annotations/README.md for the archive-side counterpart.

edition.description: Short edition id within the source text (e.g. tls, CK-KZ).

payload.description: Free-form annotation content. Shape may evolve per source role.

sourceRole.description: What kind of annotation this is in the source pipeline. Defaults to bsky:org.bunkankun.annotation when produced by this lexicon.

supersedes.description: CID of a prior record this one replaces.

anchor.description: Stable anchor: marker id within the bundle + relative offset/length in canonical PUA characters.

markerId.description: Id of a marker in the source bundle that serves as the anchor point.

offset.description: 0-indexed distance in canonical PUA characters from the marker to the start of the span.

length.description: Span length in canonical PUA characters; 0 = point annotation.

endMarkerId.description: Optional end-anchor marker id when the span crosses another marker.

endLength.description: Length past endMarkerId when the span crosses another marker.
